title_en: PI, AI4Rad Lab · Assistant Researcher · Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital
title_cn: AI4Rad Lab 课题组 PI · 助理研究员 · 上海交通大学医学院附属第六人民医院
bio_en: PI of AI4Rad Lab and Assistant Researcher at the Department of Radiology, Shanghai Sixth People's Hospital, SJTU School of Medicine. He received his PhD in Information and Communication Engineering from Shanghai Jiao Tong University (2024), advised by Prof. Ya Zhang, and was a Research Intern at the Shanghai Artificial Intelligence Laboratory (2021–2024). Before that, he earned his B.Eng. in Communication Engineering from the Honors College of the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China (2019).
bio_cn: AI4Rad 实验室课题组 PI、上海交通大学医学院附属第六人民医院放射介入科助理研究员。2024 年于上海交通大学电子系获信息与通信工程博士学位（师从张娅教授），2021–2024 年任上海人工智能实验室见习研究员；本科毕业于电子科技大学英才实验学院通信工程专业（2019）。

education_en.detail: PhD, Information and Communication Engineering (advisor: Prof. Ya Zhang)

education_en.place: University of Electronic Science and Technology of China (UESTC)
education_en.detail: B.Eng., Communication Engineering, Honors College (英才实验学院)

education_cn.place: 上海交通大学 电子系
education_cn.detail: 信息与通信工程 博士（导师：张娅教授）

education_cn.place: 电子科技大学 英才实验学院

interests_en: Representation Learning & Generalization in Medical Imaging — learning transferable, robust feature representations and tackling cross-site, cross-scanner distribution shift in clinical imaging data.

Unified Understanding & Generation of Medical Images — vision-language foundation models that jointly perform understanding (detection, segmentation, report generation) and image synthesis/enhancement.
Multicenter Clinical Generalization of Medical AI — federated and domain-generalization methods for the prospective, multicenter validation and deployment of radiology AI.
interests_cn: 医学影像的表征学习与泛化性 — 学习可迁移、鲁棒的视觉特征表征，应对跨机构、跨设备的分布偏移。
医学影像的统一理解与生成 — 视觉语言基础模型，统一实现理解（检测、分割、报告生成）与图像合成/增强。
医学影像人工智能的多中心临床泛化 — 面向放射 AI 前瞻性多中心验证与落地的联邦学习与域泛化方法。

news_en.text: BoneCoT — a whole-body skeleton foundation model for bone metastases guided by clinician-derived chain of thought — accepted by Nature Biomedical Engineering (IF 26.3).
C1 pedicle screw placement risks in ponticulus posticus — a CTA simulation study — published in Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research (IF 3.8).
HR-LLM-Stroke — a multi-agent LLM framework for emergency stroke treatment recommendation — published in Journal of Medical Internet Research. Co-first author.
BrainMIND — multicenter benchmark of LLMs for brain MRI diagnostic impression generation — published in npj Digital Medicine (IF 18.0). Co-first author.
LumbarSR — paired clinical CT & micro-CT dataset for lumbar vertebra super-resolution — published in Scientific Data. Co-first author.
Paper accepted in IEEE Trans. Medical Imaging.
Paper accepted in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR).

news_cn.text: BoneCoT —— 临床医生思维链引导的全身骨骼基础模型用于骨转移评估，被 Nature Biomedical Engineering 接收（IF 26.3）。
桥椎孔患者的 C1 椎弓根螺钉置钉风险——一项 CTA 回顾性模拟研究——发表于 Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research（IF 3.8）。
HR-LLM-Stroke —— 面向急诊卒中治疗推荐的多智能体大语言模型框架，发表于 Journal of Medical Internet Research。共同第一作者。
BrainMIND —— 大语言模型脑 MRI 诊断印象生成多中心基准，发表于 npj Digital Medicine（IF 18.0）。共同第一作者。
LumbarSR —— 配对临床 CT 与显微 CT 的腰椎超分辨率数据集，发表于 Scientific Data。共同第一作者。
一篇论文被 IEEE Trans. Medical Imaging 接收。
一篇论文被 Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR) 接收。
